scenario_description: 用户本来想把研究工作区整理成多根工作区，但在操作进行中突然改变目录组合和保存目标，要求 Agent 中断原计划并按新的交接结构收尾。

phases.instruction: 先把 /home/user/notebooks 和 /home/user/reports 加进当前工作区，然后保存成 /home/user/research.code-workspace。
先暂停，我不想把 reports 放进去。改成把 /home/user/experiments 加进来，并把最终工作区保存成 /home/user/research_handoff.code-workspace。
在最终工作区里再补上这些配置：editor.rulers 是 [88]，files.exclude 隐藏 .ipynb_checkpoints 和 __pycache__，search.exclude 隐藏 data/cache，并推荐 ms-python.python 和 ms-toolsai.jupyter。

result.command: python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; p=Path('/home/user/research_handoff.code-workspace'); old=Path('/home/user/research.code-workspace'); ok=p.exists(); data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if ok else {}; folders=[f.get('path') for f in data.get('folders', [])]; settings=data.get('settings', {}); recs=set(data.get('extensions', {}).get('recommendations', [])); ok=ok and folders==['/home/user/research-core','/home/user/notebooks','/home/user/experiments'] and settings.get('editor.rulers')==[88] and settings.get('files.exclude', {}).get('.ipynb_checkpoints') is True and settings.get('files.exclude', {}).get('__pycache__') is True and settings.get('search.exclude', {}).get('data/cache') is True and {'ms-python.python','ms-toolsai.jupyter'}.issubset(recs); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"
